title: Leap Year Checker
description: Determine if a given year is a leap year using if/else.
problemStatement:
Make your code think! A leap year is divisible by 4, but not by 100 unless it is also divisible by 400. Write a program that checks if `year = 2024` is a leap year.

**Requirement:** Use compound logical operators (`&&`, `||`).
hints: The modulo operator `%` helps check divisibility. `year % 4 == 0` check if it's divisible by 4.
Group your conditions with parentheses to ensure correct precedence.
